neo4j.cypher: MATCH (a:Person {name: 'Tom Hanks'})-[:ACTED_IN]->(m1)<-[:ACTED_IN]-(b)-[:ACTED_IN]->(m2) WHERE m1 <> m2 RETURN DISTINCT b.name, m2.title LIMIT 30

name: yearly movie count
cypher: MATCH (m:Movie) WHERE m.year > 2000 RETURN m.year, count(m) AS cnt ORDER BY m.year

native.name: yearly movie count
native.cypher: MATCH (m:Movie) WHERE m.year > 2000 RETURN m.year, count(m) AS cnt ORDER BY m.year

tetra.name: yearly movie count
tetra.cypher: MATCH (m:Movie) WHERE m.year > 2000 RETURN m.year, count(m) AS cnt ORDER BY m.year

neo4j.name: yearly movie count
neo4j.cypher: MATCH (m:Movie) WHERE m.year > 2000 RETURN m.year, count(m) AS cnt ORDER BY m.year

name: top genres by avg rating
cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[r:RATED]->(m:Movie)-[:IN_GENRE]->(g:Genre) RETURN g.name, avg(r.rating) AS avg, count(r) AS total ORDER BY avg DESC LIMIT 10

native.name: top genres by avg rating
native.cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[r:RATED]->(m:Movie)-[:IN_GENRE]->(g:Genre) RETURN g.name, avg(r.rating) AS avg, count(r) AS total ORDER BY avg DESC LIMIT 10

neo4j.name: top genres by avg rating
neo4j.cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[r:RATED]->(m:Movie)-[:IN_GENRE]->(g:Genre) RETURN g.name, avg(r.rating) AS avg, count(r) AS total ORDER BY avg DESC LIMIT 10

name: most connected actors
cypher: MATCH (a:Person)-[:ACTED_IN]->(m:Movie)<-[:ACTED_IN]-(b:Person) WHERE a <> b RETURN a.name, count(DISTINCT b) AS connections ORDER BY connections DESC LIMIT 10
